description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized fulvestrant in combination with palbociclib for the treatment of patients who are women with hormone receptor (HR)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer who have received prior endocrine therapy.

contributions.description: Adding EMA approvals for use to database
